name: docjacket
description: Connect your DocJacket transactions, tasks, deadlines, contacts, and contingencies to Claude Cowork. v0.6 adds the inbox-workflow skill set — match Gmail / Outlook emails against active deals, classify attachments, run morning briefings, prep for closings, and send follow-ups directly from your connected mailbox. The chat is the approval gate — you confirm in conversation, DocJacket executes immediately. Paste-URL-and-go install via OAuth 2.1 + DCR. Call `mcp_catalog` after install for the live tool inventory.
